case_title: STANLEY S.O. SHIN VS. QUALIS CONSULTING, A NEVADA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIN, STANLEY S.O. AS TO DEFENDANT QUALIS CONSULTING, A NEVADA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
